Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your business. No hidden fees, no surprises.

Monthly
YearlySave 20%
Starter

For Small Teams

$29$23per user / month

Perfect for small businesses just getting started with workforce management.

  • Up to 25 employees
  • Basic scheduling
  • Time tracking
  • Mobile app access
  • Email support
  • Basic reporting
  • Payroll processing
  • Advanced analytics
  • API access
Start Free Trial
Most PopularProfessional

For Growing Teams

$59$47per user / month

Everything you need to manage and scale your growing workforce.

  • Up to 100 employees
  • Advanced scheduling
  • Time tracking + GPS
  • Payroll processing
  • Compliance alerts
  • Analytics dashboard
  • Priority support
  • Integrations
  • Custom reporting
Start Free Trial
Enterprise

For Large Organizations

Customtailored to your needs

Custom solutions for enterprise-level workforce management needs.

  • Unlimited employees
  • Custom integrations
  • Advanced security
  • Dedicated success manager
  • Custom reporting
  • SLA guarantee
  • On-site training
  • API access
  • White-label options

FAQ

Pricing Questions

Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, changes take effect at your next billing cycle.

No setup fees for Starter and Professional plans. Enterprise plans may include implementation services which are quoted based on your specific requirements.

We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), ACH bank transfers, and wire transfers for Enterprise customers.

Yes, we offer 25% off for registered nonprofit organizations. Contact our sales team with your 501(c)(3) documentation to get started.

Start Your Free 14-Day Trial

No credit card required. Full access to all features.
